# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for our complete application stack (VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure components. We'll add CloudWatch alarms and detailed monitoring after we deploy and verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "AWS CloudFormation Template for complete application stack"

Resources:
  MyVPC:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::VPC"
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: "10.0.0.0/16"
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true

  InternetGateway:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::InternetGateway"

  AttachGateway:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment"
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref "MyVPC"
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref "InternetGateway"

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::Subnet"
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref "MyVPC"
      CidrBlock: "10.0.1.0/24"
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs ""]

  PrivateSubnet:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::Subnet"
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref "MyVPC"
      CidrBlock: "10.0.2.0/24"
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs ""]

  RouteTable:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::RouteTable"
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref "MyVPC"

  Route:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::Route"
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref "RouteTable"
      DestinationCidrBlock: "0.0.0.0/0"
      GatewayId: !Ref "InternetGateway"

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation"
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref "PublicSubnet"
      RouteTableId: !Ref "RouteTable"

  EC2Instance:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::Instance"
    Properties:
      InstanceType: "t2.micro"
      SubnetId: !Ref "PublicSubnet"
      ImageId: "ami-0c55b159cbfafe1f0" # Example Amazon Linux 2 AMI
      KeyName: "my-key-pair"

  MyBucket:
    Type: "AWS::S3::Bucket"
    Properties:
      BucketName: "my-application-bucket"

  LoadBalancer:
    Type: "AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer"
    Properties:
      Subnets:
        - !Ref "PublicSubnet"
      SecurityGroups: 
        - !GetAtt SecurityGroup.GroupId

  SecurityGroup:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup"
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: "Allow HTTP and SSH"
      VpcId: !Ref "MyVPC"
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: "tcp"
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: "0.0.0.0/0"
        - IpProtocol: "tcp"
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: "0.0.0.0/0"

  RDSInstance:
    Type: "AWS::RDS::DBInstance"
    Properties:
      DBInstanceClass: "db.t2.micro"
      AllocatedStorage: "20"
      DBName: "MyDatabase"
      Engine: "mysql"
      MasterUsername: "admin"
      MasterUserPassword: "password123"

Outputs:
  VPCID:
    Description: "VPC ID"
    Value: !Ref "MyVPC"
  EC2InstanceId:
    Description: "EC2 Instance ID"
    Value: !Ref "EC2Instance"
  S3BucketName:
    Description: "S3 Bucket Name"
    Value: !Ref "MyBucket"
  LoadBalancerDNS:
    Description: "Load Balancer DNS Name"
    Value: !GetAtt LoadBalancer.DNSName
  RDSInstanceEndpoint:
    Description: "RDS Endpoint"
    Value: !GetAtt RDSInstance.Endpoint.Address
